nasb.text: Then the flood came upon the earth for forty days, and the water increased and lifted up the ark, so that it rose above the earth.

esv.text: The flood continued forty days on the earth. The waters increased and bore up the ark, and it rose high above the earth.

cnv.text: 洪水就臨到地上四十天；水不斷上漲，把方舟升起，於是方舟就從地上浮起來。

ccb.text: 洪水在地上泛滥了四十天，水不断地往上涨，把方舟漂了起来。

csbs.text: 洪水在地上持续了四十天，水不断上涨，把方舟托起，方舟就从地上浮了起来。
